repos.name: bhavik-ai/trading-assistant
repos.description: AI-powered trading assistant with real-time market scanning, options analysis, and portfolio management

prs.title: feat: add bounce-scanner skill with mean-reversion scoring algorithm
prs.body: Implements the bounce-scanner skill that identifies mean-reversion opportunities in S&P 500 stocks. The scanner evaluates 5-day oscillation patterns, filters for options liquidity (OI > 500), and uses VIX-adjusted sentiment scoring to rank the top 10 candidates.

prs.title: feat: implement options-scanner with IV percentile filtering
prs.body: New options-scanner skill that identifies high-probability options plays. Filters by IV rank > 30th percentile, minimum volume of 100 contracts, and bid-ask spread < 10%.

prs.title: feat: build stock-ideas skill with sector rotation detection
prs.body: Stock ideas skill that generates trade setups with entry, target, and stop-loss levels. Includes sector rotation detection using relative strength analysis across 11 GICS sectors.

prs.title: feat: add market-pulse skill for pre-market macro snapshot
prs.body: Market-pulse skill delivers a daily macro snapshot: futures positioning, sector heatmap, VIX term structure, Fed calendar events, and key economic releases.

prs.title: feat: trade-setup skill with risk/reward calculator
prs.body: Generates fully specified trade setups including entry zone, profit targets (T1 and T2), hard stop, and expected risk/reward ratio.

prs.title: fix: bounce-scanner ranking inconsistency when VIX > 30
prs.body: Fixes edge case where VIX-adjusted scoring produced negative rank scores during high-volatility regimes.

prs.title: fix: options-scanner missing liquidity filter for LEAPS
prs.body: LEAPS contracts were bypassing the OI and volume filters due to an off-by-one in the date range check.

prs.title: refactor: unify skill output schema across all trading skills
prs.body: Standardizes JSON output contract across all trading skills. All skills now return a SkillResult envelope enabling composable pipelines.

prs.title: infra: add SKILL.md template and skill registry
prs.body: Introduces the SKILL.md specification format and a central skill registry auto-discovered at startup.

commits.message: feat: add VIX term structure parsing to market-pulse
fix: handle missing Fed calendar data gracefully
test: add unit tests for bounce-scanner scoring
refactor: extract sector-mapping into shared util
feat: add IV percentile calc using 52-week rolling window
feat: stock-ideas skill — add relative strength filter
fix: resolve race condition in concurrent skill invocations

reviews_given.pr_title: feat: add earnings calendar integration
fix: sector heatmap rendering on mobile

repos.name: bhavik-ai/bhavik-ai
repos.description: Core AI agent framework — Claude Code skills harness, settings management, and plugin orchestration

prs.title: feat: skill-creator skill for building and evaluating new skills
prs.body: Adds the skill-creator meta-skill that can scaffold, modify, and evaluate other skills. Includes a full eval harness with variance scoring across multiple runs.

prs.title: feat: performance-review skill — mine GitHub contributions and generate polished report
prs.body: Introduces the performance-review skill: Phase 1 gathers data via gh CLI, Phase 2 runs parallel subagent analysis, Phase 3 synthesizes a narrative report with HTML export.

prs.title: feat: fewer-permission-prompts skill — auto-allowlist common tool calls
prs.body: Scans recent transcripts to identify frequently approved tool calls and generates a prioritized allowlist in settings.json.

prs.title: feat: update-config skill for settings.json hook management
prs.body: New update-config skill that handles automated behavior configuration via settings.json hooks.

prs.title: feat: add meal-planner skill suite with grocery integration
prs.body: Meal-planner skill suite: weekly meal planning, nutrition tracking, pantry management, and grocery list generation with Instacart/Amazon Fresh integration.

prs.title: infra: add eval harness for skill quality measurement
prs.body: Adds a structured eval harness supporting input fixtures, expected output schemas, quality rubrics, and variance measurement.

prs.title: infra: migrate settings from flat JSON to layered config (global/project/local)
prs.body: Restructures settings into a three-layer hierarchy: global, project, and local. Includes migration script for existing users.

prs.title: feat: scrum-board skill — Sprint tracking with JIRA-style board view
prs.body: Scrum-board skill with JSON-backed board, velocity tracking, burndown charts, and GitHub Issues integration.

prs.title: fix: settings layering — local env vars not properly overriding project vars
prs.body: Env vars from settings.local.json were being merged additively instead of overriding. Fixed merge order with deep-merge semantics.

prs.title: fix: scrum-board — sprint boundary crossing causes duplicate ticket entries
prs.body: Tickets open at sprint end were being cloned instead of carried over. Fixed the sprint-close routine.

prs.title: refactor: unify skill invocation pipeline — remove legacy direct-call path
prs.body: Removes the legacy direct-invocation path. All skill calls now go through the unified pipeline with net reduction of 247 lines.

commits.message: feat: add skill-chaining support to the invocation pipeline
fix: handle null SKILL.md description gracefully
feat: eval harness — add variance scoring with confidence intervals
infra: add settings migration script v1→v2
feat: meal-planner — add nutrition deficit alerts
test: integration tests for layered settings merge
refactor: extract hook-resolver into standalone module
feat: scrum-board — burndown chart HTML export

reviews_given.pr_title: feat: add keybindings skill
docs: improve README onboarding flow
feat: add canvas-design skill

repos.name: acme-corp/data-platform
repos.description: Internal data platform — ingestion pipelines, feature store, and ML model serving infrastructure

prs.title: feat: migrate batch ingestion pipeline from Airflow to Prefect 3.0
prs.body: Migrates 23 production batch pipelines from Apache Airflow 2.6 to Prefect 3.0. Native async execution achieves 3-5x throughput increase, with real-time observability and elimination of the Airflow metadata database.

prs.title: feat: add streaming feature store with Redis-backed real-time lookups
prs.body: Extends feature store with Redis Streams + Redis Stack backing. Online feature latency reduced from 450ms average to < 10ms P99. Supports point-in-time correct batch reads for training and real-time serving.

prs.title: feat: model serving canary deployment framework
prs.body: Builds a canary deployment framework routing traffic between champion/challenger models with configurable weight splits. Auto-rolls back if challenger degrades > 5% on any KPI.

prs.title: feat: data quality gate framework for pipeline validation
prs.body: Adds data quality gates using Great Expectations as pipeline checkpoints. Gates check completeness, schema, and distribution drift. Failed gates halt downstream tasks and emit PagerDuty alerts.

prs.title: feat: self-serve feature engineering UI with DuckDB backend
prs.body: Delivers a self-serve feature engineering interface backed by DuckDB. Feature creation lead time reduced from ~2 weeks to < 1 day. Features are auto-versioned and validated before registration.

prs.title: refactor: consolidate 4 legacy ingestion connectors into unified connector SDK
prs.body: Replaces four independent connectors (Salesforce, HubSpot, Stripe, Zendesk) with a unified Connector SDK. Net code reduction of 1,267 lines. New connector development time: 3 weeks → 3 days.

prs.title: fix: feature store — time-travel query returning future values for historical training sets
prs.body: Critical: point-in-time joins were using wall-clock timestamps instead of event timestamps, causing feature leakage in training sets. Fixed timestamp resolution and re-ran affected pipelines.

prs.title: fix: Prefect pipeline — exponential backoff causing cascading delays during peak hours
prs.body: Added jitter (± 30% of base backoff) and per-pipeline retry budgets to prevent thundering-herd cascading delays.

prs.title: fix: DuckDB memory limit causing OOM on large feature preview queries
prs.body: Added configurable memory_limit per query (default 2GB), automatic LIMIT injection for preview mode, and a query cost estimator.

commits.message: feat: add Prefect flow visualization to monitoring dashboard
fix: Redis Stream consumer group rebalancing on pod restart
feat: canary framework — add automatic p99 latency tracking
test: add time-travel assertion helpers to feature store test suite
refactor: feature store — extract TTL management into separate service
feat: data quality — add distribution drift detection via KL divergence
fix: Great Expectations schema mismatch on nullable columns
feat: connector SDK — add schema validation on registration

reviews_given.pr_title: feat: add dbt transformation layer for analytics models
feat: Snowflake cost optimization — query result caching
fix: schema registry race condition on concurrent registrations
feat: add Kafka consumer lag monitoring alerts
refactor: unify logging format across all pipeline workers
feat: add feature store monitoring dashboard

repos.name: acme-corp/ml-platform
repos.description: Machine learning platform — experiment tracking, model registry, and training orchestration

prs.title: feat: unified experiment tracking API wrapping MLflow and W&B
prs.body: Introduces a unified experiment tracking API abstracting over MLflow and Weights & Biases. Teams can switch backends without changing experiment code.

prs.title: feat: automated model retraining triggers on data drift detection
prs.body: Implements automatic model retraining triggers when feature drift exceeds configured thresholds (JS divergence > 0.1). Includes configurable cool-down periods.

prs.title: feat: model card generation from training metadata
prs.body: Auto-generates model cards following the Hugging Face spec from training run metadata. Required for production registration, ensuring governance compliance.

prs.title: feat: GPU cost optimizer — spot instance fallback with checkpoint recovery
prs.body: Reduces training costs 60-70% using AWS Spot instances with checkpoint-based recovery. Average cost reduction: $18K/month across all training jobs.

prs.title: fix: MLflow artifact storage leaking credentials via query params
prs.body: Presigned S3 URLs for MLflow artifacts were being logged in debug mode. Replaced with redacted placeholders and added sanitization middleware.

prs.title: refactor: model registry — migrate from file-based to PostgreSQL-backed metadata store
prs.body: Migrates model registry from YAML files in S3 to PostgreSQL. Enables concurrent registrations, full audit trail, and complex queries. Zero-downtime migration included.

commits.message: feat: add sweep comparison view to experiment tracking UI
fix: checkpoint recovery failing on multi-GPU training runs
feat: add model lineage tracking to model cards
test: integration tests for drift-triggered retraining pipeline
refactor: extract credential-sanitization into shared middleware
chore: upgrade PyTorch to 2.4.1, update CUDA compat matrix

reviews_given.pr_title: feat: add ONNX export support to model registry
feat: hyperparameter sweep with Optuna backend
fix: training job scheduling starvation under high load
refactor: move experiment config to Pydantic models

repos.name: acme-corp/internal-tools
repos.description: Developer productivity tools — deployment CLI, incident runbooks, and internal dashboards

prs.title: feat: deploy CLI with blue-green rollout and automatic smoke tests
prs.body: New deploy-ctl CLI wrapping Kubernetes rollout with blue-green semantics. Runs smoke tests after each rollout step and rolls back on first failure.

prs.title: feat: incident dashboard — real-time service health with SLO tracking
prs.body: Aggregates PagerDuty alerts, Datadog metrics, and Grafana dashboards into a single real-time view with SLO burn rates. Incident triage time reduced ~40%.

prs.title: feat: automated runbook generation from incident history
prs.body: Analyzes PagerDuty incident history and Slack channels to auto-generate markdown runbooks for recurring patterns. New runbooks stored in internal wiki.

prs.title: fix: deploy-ctl smoke tests not respecting timeout on slow startup services
prs.body: Added per-service configurable startup grace periods and increased default health-check timeout from 30s to 90s.

prs.title: fix: incident dashboard — SLO burn rate calculation incorrect for multi-window policies
prs.body: Multi-window SLO burn rates were averaging instead of taking the max. Fixed to use maximum across windows per Google SRE spec.

prs.title: refactor: deploy-ctl — migrate from shell scripts to TypeScript with typed config
prs.body: Rewrites deploy-ctl from bash scripts to typed TypeScript. Deployment configs validated via Zod schemas at parse time, eliminating typo-class runtime errors.

prs.title: feat: on-call rotation optimizer with fatigue scoring
prs.body: On-call rotation optimizer factoring in timezone distribution, recent incident load, and declared unavailabilities. Fatigue scoring tracks cumulative incident hours per person.

prs.title: feat: Slack-integrated deployment status notifications
prs.body: Adds Slack integration to deploy-ctl: posts deployment start/success/failure notifications with diff summary and rollback links.

prs.title: chore: upgrade React from 17 to 18, migrate to concurrent features
prs.body: Upgrades incident dashboard to React 18 with createRoot API, concurrent rendering for charts, and Suspense boundaries.

commits.message: feat: add deployment diff view to Slack notification
fix: runbook generator missing resolution steps for timeout patterns
feat: on-call optimizer — add bank holiday awareness
test: e2e tests for deploy-ctl blue-green rollout
docs: deploy-ctl usage guide with example configs
fix: incident dashboard not refreshing SLO data on tab focus

reviews_given.pr_title: feat: add cost attribution dashboard
feat: Terraform drift detection alerts
fix: PagerDuty webhook signature verification
feat: add Grafana dashboard templating
chore: switch from npm to pnpm workspaces
